'''jayoso''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:chabouk|chabouk]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-y-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:chabouk|chabouk]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| jayoso
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:jæyeseth|jæyeseth]] || [[word:jæyesej|jæyesej]] || [[word:jæyesesh|jæyesesh]] || [[word:jæyese|jæyese]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:jayoyosoth|jayoyosoth]] || [[word:jayoyosoj|jayoyosoj]] || [[word:jayoyososh|jayoyososh]] || [[word:jayoyoso|jayoyoso]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:jayosoth|jayosoth]] || [[word:jayosoj|jayosoj]] || [[word:jayososh|jayososh]] || [[word:jayoso|jayoso]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:jayofsoth|jayofsoth]] || [[word:jayofsoj|jayofsoj]] || [[word:jayofsosh|jayofsosh]] || [[word:jayofsof|jayofsof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:jayosotho|jayosotho]] || [[word:jayosojo|jayosojo]] || [[word:jayososho|jayososho]] || [[word:jayosoko|jayosoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:jayosoth|jayosoth]] || [[word:jayosoj|jayosoj]] || [[word:jayososh|jayososh]] || [[word:jayoso|jayoso]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:jayosothol|jayosothol]] || [[word:jayosojol|jayosojol]] || [[word:jayososhol|jayososhol]] || [[word:jayosokol|jayosokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:jayosothotho|jayosothotho]] || [[word:jayosojojo|jayosojojo]] || [[word:jayososhosho|jayososhosho]] || [[word:jayosoko|jayosoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:jayosothon|jayosothon]] || [[word:jayosojon|jayosojon]] || [[word:jayososhon|jayososhon]] || [[word:jayosokon|jayosokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:jayosothoro|jayosothoro]] || [[word:jayosojoro|jayosojoro]] || [[word:jayososhoro|jayososhoro]] || [[word:jayosokoro|jayosokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4f6272c}}
